summary: Comprehensive test of Emanator E1 final batch changes: tool handler extraction, search_replace robustness, and Creative Brief form overhaul. All 10 features tested and PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: tool-handlers.js correctly exports 9 handlers: handleReadFilesTool, handleVerifyBuildTool, handleExecCommandTool, handleScreenshotVerifyTool, handleUpdateMemoryTool, handleUpdateCanvasTool, handleDeleteFilesTool, handlePlanProjectTool, handleSummarizeProjectTool
message-stream.js line 20 imports all tool handlers correctly
message-stream.js lines 2944-3010 call handlers with context objects (_ctx pattern)
agent-tools.js lines 73-133 implement 3-level fallback matching: exact → trailing whitespace normalized → indentation-tolerant
InlineBrief.jsx uses text inputs (textarea/input) for Primary Goal, Tone, Budget, Most Important Page instead of dropdowns
Art Direction section (renamed from Media Bin) at line 296 in InlineBrief.jsx
Build Project button text at line 345 in InlineBrief.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E1 final batch changes verified working. Tool handlers extracted to tool-handlers.js, search_replace has 3-level fallback matching, Creative Brief form uses text inputs instead of dropdowns.

login_flow.details: Login with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER / REDACTED_LEAKED_PASSWORD successful, redirects to dashboard with 'Welcome back!' toast

creative_brief_text_inputs.details: Primary Goal is textarea (not dropdown), Tone of Voice is input (not dropdown), Budget is input (not dropdown), Most Important Page is input (not dropdown)

art_direction_section.details: Art Direction section found (renamed from Media Bin) with image upload dropzone

build_project_button.details: Button says 'Build Project' instead of 'New Project'

chat_interface.details: Chat interface loads with input field, Preview/Code/Assets/Logs/Export/Deploy tabs

no_canvasUpdated_errors.details: No 'canvasUpdated is not defined' errors in console - variable correctly scoped

no_task_mode_violations.details: No task mode violation errors observed during testing

core_system_workspace.details: Core System Workspace loads with Project Canvas showing Status, Completed items, Next Steps, Notes

tool_handlers_extraction.details: 227 lines, exports 9 handlers with ctx pattern for mutable state

search_replace_fallback.details: 3-level fallback: exact match → trailing whitespace normalized → indentation-tolerant
